title: Better recipes
description: A datapack wich adds a few quality of life recipes
body:
# Better recipes adds quality of live recipes

### Recipes:

- rottenflesh ➡️ leather (furnice, smoker, campfire)
- sand        ➡️ glas (now in a blastfurnice)
- wool        ➡️ 4x string (craftingtable)
- better rail recipes (look into changelog from version 1.1)
- bonemeal -> bones
- craftable froglights
- craftable glowing ink sacs
- flint -> gunpowder
- craftable prismarine shards / crystals
- craftable trident

### All recipes that are not listed below are in the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better-recipes-tostbroti/gallery)

</details>

### Join my Discord for:
- suggest recipes (Ill add every wich makes sense and is possible (mostly every) )**
- get pinged for new datapacks
- updates for all of my datapacks
- talk to me
- link: https://discord.gg/r2NkP67T9r

### Comming soon:

- suggest thing that should be added (Discord)

## Updates 🔄️: 
**2.1:**
## 🎉New recipes🎉:

### Added following recipes from [Peaceful Mob Drops Complete](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/peaceful-mob-drops-complete):

- bonemeal -> bones
- craftable froglights
- craftable glowing ink sacs
- flint -> gunpowder
- craftable prismarine shards / crystals
- craftable trident

###  credits:
-  ty to [FoxyRoxySmile](https://www.curseforge.com/members/foxyroxysmile/projects) for giving me the ideas for the recipes

## 2.0 update:
- invisible item frames
- light blocks
- raw blocks ➡️ normal blocks
